'''lazhulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:measlings|measlings]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-zh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:measlings|measlings]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lazhulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læzhilith|læzhilith]] || [[word:læzhilij|læzhilij]] || [[word:læzhilish|læzhilish]] || [[word:læzhili|læzhili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lazhuzhuluth|lazhuzhuluth]] || [[word:lazhuzhuluj|lazhuzhuluj]] || [[word:lazhuzhulush|lazhuzhulush]] || [[word:lazhuzhulu|lazhuzhulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lazhuluth|lazhuluth]] || [[word:lazhuluj|lazhuluj]] || [[word:lazhulush|lazhulush]] || [[word:lazhulu|lazhulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lazhufluth|lazhufluth]] || [[word:lazhufluj|lazhufluj]] || [[word:lazhuflush|lazhuflush]] || [[word:lazhufluf|lazhufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lazhuluthu|lazhuluthu]] || [[word:lazhuluju|lazhuluju]] || [[word:lazhulushu|lazhulushu]] || [[word:lazhuluku|lazhuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lazhuluth|lazhuluth]] || [[word:lazhuluj|lazhuluj]] || [[word:lazhulush|lazhulush]] || [[word:lazhulu|lazhulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lazhuluthul|lazhuluthul]] || [[word:lazhulujul|lazhulujul]] || [[word:lazhulushul|lazhulushul]] || [[word:lazhulukul|lazhulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lazhuluthuthu|lazhuluthuthu]] || [[word:lazhulujuju|lazhulujuju]] || [[word:lazhulushushu|lazhulushushu]] || [[word:lazhuluku|lazhuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lazhuluthun|lazhuluthun]] || [[word:lazhulujun|lazhulujun]] || [[word:lazhulushun|lazhulushun]] || [[word:lazhulukun|lazhulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lazhuluthuoro|lazhuluthuoro]] || [[word:lazhulujuoro|lazhulujuoro]] || [[word:lazhulushuoro|lazhulushuoro]] || [[word:lazhulukuoro|lazhulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
